# Parking Guard

> Parking Guard is a smartphone app that turns a parked car's phone into a
> surveillance camera, capturing evidence (readable license plates and faces)
> of hit-and-run, door dings, and vandalism while the vehicle is parked.

## Overview
Parking Guard detects motion, sound, and impact while your car is parked,
records video evidence, and can automatically back up detections to Google
Drive and notify you by Gmail.

## Pages
- English (default): https://parkingguard.app/
- 日本語: https://parkingguard.app/ja/
- Deutsch: https://parkingguard.app/de/
- Español: https://parkingguard.app/es/
